quality.completeness: Complete. All essential fields (slug, name, type, rarity, attunement, description, charge mechanics) are present.

effect.result: Wand pulses and points to the nearest target if one exists within range.

mechanics.mechanic_notes: Standard charge-based detection item. The regeneration roll (1d3) introduces variability to its daily utility, which is a common and acceptable design choice for Uncommon items.
